abort.device_added: The dispatch device was added successfully.

error.entity_not_found: One or more of the selected entities could not be found in Home Assistant.

data_description.estimated_power: Expected power draw in watts. Used to deduct from the remaining surplus when this device is switched on.
data_description.min_battery_state: The battery must be at or above this percentage for the algorithm to turn this device on.
data_description.name: A friendly label displayed on the virtual dispatch switch in your dashboard.
data_description.power_entity: When set, the actual measured power is used instead of the estimated value when recalculating the surplus after turning this device off.
data_description.priority: How urgently this device should receive surplus power. `Highest` devices are served first; `Lowest` devices only receive surplus when all higher-priority devices are already satisfied.
data_description.switch_entity: The real switch or plug entity that will be turned on or off by the algorithm.

data_description.allowance_entity: An `input_number` or `number` entity whose value in watts is added to the computed surplus. Change it from your dashboard to tune dispatch sensitivity without reconfiguring.
data_description.battery_charge_entity: Sensor measuring the battery charging power in watts. Its value is added to the grid value to compute the total available surplus.
data_description.battery_charge_invert: Enable this if your battery charge sensor reports positive values when discharging instead of charging.
data_description.battery_state_entity: Sensor measuring the battery state of charge in percent. Used to enforce the minimum battery level threshold configured per device.
data_description.grid_entity: Sensor measuring the power exchanged with the grid in watts. Check the 'invert' option if positive means exporting surplus.
data_description.grid_invert: Enable this if your grid sensor reports positive values when importing from the grid (most common). Disabling assumes positive means exporting.
data_description.scan_interval: How often the dispatch algorithm runs, in seconds. Minimum: 10 s.

reconfigure.description: Update the sensor entities used by the dispatch algorithm.
reconfigure.title: Reconfigure energy inputs

data_description.battery_state_entity: Sensor measuring the battery state of charge in percent. Used to enforce the minimum battery level threshold configured per device.
data_description.grid_entity: Sensor measuring the power exchanged with the grid in watts. Check the 'invert' option if positive means exporting surplus.
data_description.grid_invert: Enable this if your grid sensor reports positive values when importing from the grid (most common). Disabling assumes positive means exporting.

select_remove.description: Removing a device stops algorithm control for it. The underlying switch will not be turned off automatically.
